Phase-76.NAME: Consolidated Frontend Polish Gate
Phase-76.summary: Approved cross-phase verification gate for Phase-72 through Phase-75 so user and admin polish changes are checked together before release preparation.
Phase-76.approved-by-operator: Operator confirmed Phase-72 through Phase-76 plan.

scope.in: User/frontend build, admin/frontend build, Phase-72 through Phase-75 smokes, user cabinet regressions, admin cockpit regressions, backend tests only for touched API surfaces, XML/MyGRACE/diff gates, and protected deploy/runtime guard.
scope.out: New product features beyond Phase-72 through Phase-75, release tagging, GitHub push, clean VPS deployment, install/deploy script changes, runtime topology changes, and payment provider changes.

requirements.requirement-1: All user polish from Phase-72 and Phase-73 must be verified together because both touch Layout, Config, SubscriptionPanel, and shared CSS.
requirements.requirement-2: All admin polish from Phase-74 and Phase-75 must be verified together because both touch Layout, navigation, route registration, and bounded scrolling.
requirements.requirement-3: Protected deploy/runtime surfaces must remain unchanged unless a later approved phase explicitly changes them.
requirements.requirement-4: Any backend API changes from Phase-73 or Phase-75 must have targeted backend tests and no migration drift unless explicitly required.

steps.step-1: Run cd frontend && npm run build.
steps.step-2: Run cd frontend-admin && npm run build.
steps.step-3: Run Phase-72 and Phase-73 user smokes for login, navigation, calendar, settings removal, Amnezia guidance, config copy, and tariff-aware device-limit messaging.
steps.step-4: Run Phase-74 and Phase-75 admin smokes for login padding, removed Tariffs nav, logout placement, scroll/rail bounds, unified Users/Devices inventory, and confirmation-safe actions.
steps.step-5: Run user regressions: Phase-57, Phase-61, Phase-68, Phase-70, and Phase-71.
steps.step-6: Run admin regressions: Phase-54, Phase-58, Phase-59, and Phase-62.
steps.step-7: Run targeted backend tests only if Phase-73 or Phase-75 changed API shape; otherwise record backend-not-touched evidence.
steps.step-8: Run XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected guard over install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose.yml, deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml, .env.example, mtproto-runtime, official-mtproxy, telegram-bot.

data-flow.flow-1: Phase-72/73 user changes -> consolidated user build and smoke bundle -> protected user-cabinet regression confidence.
data-flow.flow-2: Phase-74/75 admin changes -> consolidated admin build and smoke bundle -> protected admin navigation/inventory confidence.
data-flow.flow-3: All touched source/docs -> XML/MyGRACE/diff/protected-surface gates -> release candidate readiness signal.

verification-design.gate-2: Every new Phase-72 through Phase-75 smoke must pass.
verification-design.gate-3: Selected regression smokes must pass to prove older Phase-57 through Phase-71 behavior is not lost.
verification-design.gate-4: MyGRACE indexes and per-phase files must remain synchronized after execution.

verification-matrix.module-local: V-M-009, V-M-010, V-M-036, V-M-037, V-M-063, V-M-066, V-M-068, V-M-071, V-M-074, V-M-075, V-M-076, and V-M-077 carry Phase-76 planned gates for their scoped user/admin/frontend regression surfaces.
verification-matrix.wave-level: User wave requires frontend build, Phase-72/73 smokes, session smoke, and Phase-57/61/68/70/71 regressions; admin wave requires frontend-admin build, Phase-74/75 smokes, and Phase-54/58/59/62 regressions.
verification-matrix.phase-level: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard must pass before Phase-76 can move beyond planned verification.

telemetry-requirements.allowed: Command name, exit code, route label, viewport label, selector/check marker, protected-surface diff summary, build size, and redacted failure code.
telemetry-requirements.forbidden: Passwords, access/refresh tokens, admin tokens, reset/verify tokens, API keys, VPN private keys, VPN config bodies, MTProto secrets, full proxy links, raw user IPs, payment IDs, server credentials, and raw .env values.

autonomous-execution-safety.allowed: Run local frontend/admin builds, approved smoke scripts, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and documentation synchronization for Phase-76.
autonomous-execution-safety.blocked: Release tagging, GitHub push, clean VPS deployment, install/deploy script edits, nginx/docker/runtime topology edits, payment provider edits, and backend API changes unless a Phase-76 failure proves a touched API surface must be fixed under a separate approved fix.
autonomous-execution-safety.handoff-trigger: Stop and report if Phase-76 execution requires production credentials, live server mutation, a new backend contract, or any protected deploy/runtime change.

risks.risk-1: Passing individual phases can still leave cross-phase UI regressions, especially around shared Layout/CSS.
risks.risk-2: Admin route deletion and user mobile dock can interact with responsive gates in ways not visible in single-page checks.
risks.risk-3: This phase may discover polish regressions but should not introduce new code beyond focused fixes needed to close verification.

Phase-76.acceptance: Phase-76 is done when Phase-72 through Phase-75 are collectively verified, old user/admin regression gates still pass, MyGRACE is synchronized, protected deploy/runtime surfaces are clean, and the project is ready for a prerelease or stable release decision.
